facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 106 reviews. At an amusement park in Rạch Vẹm, Phú Quốc.

Ngoc Hien Treasure is not the park tourists default to. It sits north, away from the main drag, and locals rate it nearly perfect.

106 people gave it 4.9. That number is hard to fake.

If you're traveling with kids, or just want a day that isn't another beach bar, this is your move.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Rides, animals, and a 4.9 rating at Ngoc Hien Treasure in Rạch Vẹm. This park is pulling near-perfect scores and most tourists drive straight past it. Watch till the end.

Ngoc Hien Treasure. Most tourists never make it north. Their loss.
